subject: ProtocolEvent.eventId
truth: ProtocolEvent.eventId has been renamed to event_id to match the wire field.
quote: fix(langgraph): rename ProtocolEvent.eventId to event_id to match the wire field (#7942)

subject: ensure_config merging behaviour
truth: ensure_config now merges callbacks, tags, metadata, and configurable instead of overwriting them.
quote: fix(langgraph): merge instead of overwrite in ensure_config for callbacks, tags, metadata, configurable (#7926)

subject: tool results in v3 messages
old: tool results were included in v3 messages
new: tool results are kept out of v3 messages
truth: Tool results are no longer included in v3 messages; they are kept out.
quote: fix(langgraph): keep tool results out of v3 messages (#7838)

from_fact: tool results were included in v3 messages
tool results are kept out of v3 messages
